name: zinput_update_steer_pitch_force_effects
description: zInputDI::UpdateSteerAndPitchForceEffects updates DirectInput steer and pitch force-feedback effects from player yaw and pitch state.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zInput_DI_UpdateSteerAndPitchForceEffects@4 at 0x42fdc0 failed with 402 unmasked mismatches after masking 56 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 465 bytes, the VC object symbol is 288 bytes, and the triage artifact is build/vc6-verify/zinput_update_steer_pitch_force_effects/verify/42fdc0_byte_triage.txt.

The current source factors common DirectInput descriptor setup through SetAndStartDirectionalForceFeedbackEffect; a later zInput force-feedback source-cluster pass should revisit helper inlining and compiler flag shape before binary-safe acceptance.
functional_evidence: Direct Binary Ninja evidence for 0x42fdc0 shows provider calls through zInput_DiEffectVtable SetParameters_18 and Start_1c after constructing a DIEFFECT direction/gain descriptor.

The native smoke covers steer and pitch update paths, including negative yaw direction 0x5a, pitch direction 0, gain scaling to DirectInput 0..10000 units, SetParameters flags 0x44, DIEFFECT flags 0x20, two-axis direction data, and Start(1, 0) dispatch.
